atlas v0.5
Back To Movements

Historical Movement

Brutalism / Neo-Brutalism

结构裸露、边界鲜明、不讨好。网页里的 neo-brutalism 往往更鲜艳、更可用。

Period

1950s roots / 2010s-2020s web revival

Origin

Architecture roots / Web reinterpretation

Why It Matters

当你不想继续做一种平滑中性的互联网模板时，neo-brutalism 是最常见的反作用力之一。

Core Traits

先理解这条语言本身

Principles

  • hard edges
  • visible borders
  • assertive contrast
  • anti-polish energy

Watchouts

  • 最容易误做成噪音
  • 不能为了态度牺牲基本可读性

Sample Gallery

历史语言在今天的网页里如何现身

Descendant Families

今天在网页里更接近哪些家族

Web Family

Playful Postmodern / Anti-Grid

A deliberately less obedient family: bold shapes, anti-grid moments, bright accents, and a visible attitude against neutral template sameness.

Historical Roots

Postmodern / MemphisBrutalism / Neo-Brutalism

Best For

creator brandsexperimental commerceidentity-led products
Open family

Reference Links

继续读历史和看案例

  • Wix: Brutalist Websites
  • Gumroad

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.
